artPrompt: An ongoing enchantment: a strange humming contraption of brass dials, wound clipboards, and a brassy bullhorn fused into one civic machine, glowing warm gold at its seams as ghostly threads of light connect it to neighbors gathered around a folding table on a sunlit town green. The wide frame towers the device, one golden afternoon light source isolating it against leafy shadow, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Civic Engagement Engine
text:
Whenever one or more Voters enter the battlefield under your control, you gain that much life and put that many signature counters on Civic Engagement Engine.
Remove five signature counters from Civic Engagement Engine: Create a 4/4 green and white Citizen creature token with vigilance and trample named Coalition.
flavorText: Plug in enough neighbors and the whole thing starts to hum. Then it starts to march.
